name: Gaming Innovation Group Inc.
summary: Gaming Innovation Group Inc., together with its subsidiaries, provides gaming, betting, media, and turnkey platform solutions and services in Nordic countries, other European countries, and internationally. The company offers a player account management, a technical platform offering various services for iGaming operators, such as game and payment services, and ancillary services comprising live chat, email systems, affiliate systems, and CRM. It also provides media services, including digital marketing services comprising keyword and pay-per-click advertising, SEO, SEM, and affiliate and permission marketing services for online casino, poker, and sports betting, as well as operates various content websites; and sportsbook, a sports betting omnichannel solution that offers a various digital content and sports events to players. In addition, the company offers managed services that include 27/7 customer support, content management, etc., as well as omnichannel solutions; date solutions that allow operators to make decisions on marketing, compliance, and bonus promotion; Logic, a real-time rules engine that enables operators to define and create business rules; frontend framework and customer management system solutions; and marketing compliance solutions. Gaming Innovation Group Inc. has a strategic partnership with Betgenius Limited to create a sportsbook and platform solution for operators in regulated markets worldwide. The company was founded in 2012 and is headquartered in St Julians, Malta.
